font.previewPlaceholder: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.

unsupported.title: Current browser not supported
unsupported.description: Listing local fonts is only available in Chromium-based desktop browsers version 103 and above (e.g., Google Chrome and Microsoft Edge). Firefox and Safari are currently not supported.

permission.title: Please grant access to local fonts
permission.description: Permission is required to access the fonts installed on this device. Your font data will never leave your local machine.

empty.title: No fonts found
empty.description: No fonts match the current filter criteria. Please try adjusting your search or source.
